case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC VS. ERIK D LANTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-30-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC AS TO DEFENDANT LANTER, ERIK D DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-28-2020
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEYS FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200026584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-25-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200026584) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200026584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $3,021.52 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 78343388) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200008725), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC SERVED MAR-07-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANTER, ERIK D

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $320.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200026584) AS TO DEFENDANT LANTER, ERIK D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-30-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-25-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANTER, ERIK D $6,327.34 PRINCIPAL, $320.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,647.34, SEE SCANNED DOC
